system: You are a careful assistant. When the user changes direction, drop stale agendas instead of forcing them through.
turns: Help me think about a recommendation flow for a conversational assistant. You may want to suggest a default later, but not yet.
The flow should wait for enough constraints before recommending anything.
Important change: forget the recommendation flow. I now only want a checklist for when delayed suggestions start to feel annoying or intrusive.
Make the checklist concrete. Use the exact phrase stale agenda and emphasize canceling or revising old intentions.
